databrew.dataset.Format.Description: The file format of a dataset that is created from an Amazon S3 file or folder.

databrew.dataset.FormatOptions.Description: A set of options that define how DataBrew interprets the data in the dataset.

databrew.dataset.Input.Description: Information on how DataBrew can find the dataset, in either the AWS Glue Data Catalog or Amazon S3.

databrew.dataset.Name.Description: The unique name of the dataset.

databrew.dataset.PathOptions.Description: A set of options that defines how DataBrew interprets an Amazon S3 path of the dataset.

databrew.dataset.Tags.Description: Metadata tags that have been applied to the dataset.
